data.title: Foundation for a Drug-Free World Volunteers Reach Athletes and Communities Across Italy During 2026 Winter Olympics
data.description: In Milan, Italy, on April 3, 2026, over 600 volunteers from the Foundation for a Drug-Free World embarked on a mission during the 2026 Winter Olympics and Paralympics in Milano and Cortina. They traveled throughout Italy to spread awareness about the dangers of drug use to athletes, tourists, and locals.

data.title: IBRX INVESTOR ALERT: ImmunityBio (IBRX) Sued After FDA Flags Misleading Cancer Claims, Shares Plunge 21%, $2B Market Cap Lost -- Hagens Berman
data.description: A securities class action lawsuit has been filed against ImmunityBio, Inc. (NASDAQ: IBRX) as it is accused of fraudulent behavior by failing to disclose crucial information to investors. The lawsuit aims to cover those who bought ImmunityBio securities from January 19, 2026 to March 24, 2026. This legal action comes on the heels of revelations concerning undisclosed data impacting the company's share price.
John Fetterman reveals 6 new stock trades, including MSFT, MU, ERIE, GOOG, AMZN. Total updates: 7 trades.

data.title: COTY INVESTOR ALERT: Coty Inc. (COTY) Sued After Surprise Profit Decline, CEO Exit, and Withdrawn 2026 Guidance -- Hagens Berman
data.description: In San Francisco on April 3, 2026, it was revealed that Coty Inc. (NYSE: COTY) is currently dealing with a securities class action lawsuit. This lawsuit aims to represent investors who bought or acquired Coty common stock within the period of November 5, 2025, to February 4, 2026. The legal action stems from developments occurring on February 5, 2026.

data.title: Fortinet Investigation Initiated: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates the Officers and Directors of Fortinet Inc. - FTNT
data.description: On April 3, 2026, in New York and New Orleans, Charles C. Foti, Jr., a former Louisiana Attorney General and current partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF), revealed the initiation of an investigation into Fortinet Inc. (NasdaqGS: FTNT).

data.title: ODD INVESTOR ALERT: ODDITY Tech. (ODD) Sued After Shares Plunge 49% on AI Platform Disruption and Revenue Decline -- Hagens Berman
data.description: On April 3, 2026, it was reported that a securities class action lawsuit was initiated against ODDITY Tech. Ltd. (NASDAQ: ODD). The lawsuit aims to represent investors who bought ODDITY securities within the timeframe of February 26, 2025, to February 24, 2026. This legal action was prompted by a significant 49% decrease in the value of ODDITY securities during the mentioned period.

data.title: NYC Disinfection Services Awarded Three Citywide Locksmith Service Contracts
data.description: In Queens, New York, on April 3, 2026, NYC Disinfection Services, Inc., a certified Women-Owned Business Enterprise (WBE), has secured three citywide contracts to offer locksmith services throughout New York City. This achievement is noteworthy as it signals an important expansion for the company in the city.

data.title: Sense Adventure Celebrates 26 Years of Offering Sunset World Group Members and Guests a Sensory Immersion Experience in Tres Ríos Natural Park
data.description: In Cancun, Mexico, on April 2, 2026, Sense Adventure marked its 26th anniversary of offering a transformative sensory adventure to members and visitors of Sunset World Group at Tres Ríos Natural Park. This immersive experience aims to facilitate a genuine reconnection, allowing each participant to awaken their senses.
GBP/USD slips after blockbuster NFP revives Fed hold outlook-FX

data.title: Blokees made its debut at 2026 Thailand Toy Expo, exhibiting multiple products
data.description: In Shanghai on April 4, 2026, it was reported that the Assembly Character Toys brand Blokees was introduced during the 2026 Thailand Toy Expo from April 2 to 31. The brand showcased Blokees Model Kits and Blokees Wheels as its primary categories, presenting a wide range of over 300 products.

data.title: Vireo Growth Inc. Partners with Ace Ventures to Establish New York’s First Minority-owned Vertically Integrated Medical Cannabis Operator
data.description: A MWBE-led company, Ace Ventures, is set to acquire majority ownership of Vireo Health of New York. This partnership aims to support New York's social equity framework, emphasizing long-term alignment. This transition indicates a significant change in ownership structure and strategy, with Ace Ventures taking the lead role in managing Vireo Health of New York. This move solidifies the commitment to diversity and equity in business operations, with potential impacts on the healthcare industry in New York.
